title: Refresh of PIP-4 the Ecosystem Fund
brief: This proposal continues the Star Atlas Ecosystem Fund and establishes a budget of 20% of the Star Atlas DAO’s Treasury.
description:
# 1. PIP Details
## PIP Name: Refresh of PIP-4 the Ecosystem Fund
* Category: Governance
* Authors: [the Star Atlas Council #2](https://govern.staratlas.com/proposals/7b48a62d-13c3-4a1e-8565-6ea7bfb4b4dc) (SAC-2): Lanzer, Bodhi, Signal, Emperor, DrumCarl05

## CONTEXT & HISTORY OF CHANGES
* This PIP replaces [PIP-4](https://govern.staratlas.com/proposals/ad1945d8-60dc-4ed7-b52a-63dd33f97415): Star Atlas Ecosystem Fund in its entirety
* Updates include:
   * Adds a formula to calculate 5% Ecosystem Fund rule
   * Adds clarity on Star Atlas Council responsibilities
   * Adds clarity that all payments will be made in ATLAS, and USDC will be converted to ATLAS.
   * Removes contradicting statements (such as “per person”) to clear up confusion
   * Aligns and standardizes terminology, such as substituting “grants” for “proposal”, “must” as “shall”, “disbursement” as “payment”, and “approved” as “passed”]

___

# 2. SUMMARY
* This proposal continues the Star Atlas Ecosystem Fund (hereafter called “the Ecosystem Fund”), establishes a budget of 20% of the Star Atlas DAO’s Treasury (hereafter called “the DAO Treasury”). 
* This proposal establishes a process by which community members may apply for funding. **See Section 3.**
* The Star Atlas Council (hereafter called “SAC”) has the authority to steward the Ecosystem Fund. **See Section 5.**
* Per Star Atlas [DAO Help Page](https://support.staratlas.com/dao-treasury-help-page), the wallet for the DAO Treasury is [CuwnarNh7FEqZMmffFjRyWj54RecyS7zwFg1CxfzNudi](https://solscan.io/account/CuwnarNh7FEqZMmffFjRyWj54RecyS7zwFg1CxfzNudi#portfolio), and the wallet for the Ecosystem Fund is [BxKehkp298nQunu8BWxh5U6VvfphFyjEB3t7USst7Uag](https://solscan.io/account/BxKehkp298nQunu8BWxh5U6VvfphFyjEB3t7USst7Uag#portfolio). **See Section 4.**

___

# 3. MOTIVATION
* **GOAL.** The success of Star Atlas is and always has been community-driven. The primary goal of this proposal is to create a new path for the Star Atlas community to identify and award funding to those who will build new Star Atlas experiences and products. Although the Star Atlas community and guilds have already been extraordinarily active in this regard — from developing player tools and gameplay experiences to creating merch to hosting community meetups — this proposal is intended to generate even more excitement among community builders.
* **SCOPE.** The types of efforts that could be funded under this proposal include:
   1. Creating software tools that enhance player experiences
   2. Hosting community in-person or virtual meetups
   3. Supporting educational or informational initiatives to grow the Star Atlas community
   4. Building new creative works or materials — such as videos, art, or music — based on Star Atlas intellectual property
   5. Other types of efforts could be funded, as long as they relate to the development or improvement of Star Atlas, and as long as the product or experience is open to all Star Atlas community members (rather than, for example, benefiting only one guild or faction).
* **TERMS.** Products using Star Atlas intellectual property shall adhere to the Star Atlas Terms of Service, including the terms relating to using the “Powered by the People” logo in Appendix C and following the applicable royalty terms.

___

# 4. SPECIFICATION
## a. Creation and Initial Funding
* The following amounts from the DAO Treasury shall be allocated to be used exclusively for the Ecosystem Fund:
   * 20% of the ATLAS, and 
   * 20% of any USDC amount exceeding $500,000
* If there is $500,000 USDC **or less** in the DAO Treasury wallet, **no** initial USDC will be allocated for the Ecosystem Fund. 
* There is no corresponding ATLAS limitation.
* After PIP-4 passed on Aug 6, 2024, an initial funding amount of 159,713,142 ATLAS ($517,609.53 value on day of transfer) was allocated from the DAO Treasury wallet to the Ecoystem Fund wallet on Oct 4, 2024, transaction ID [3N6g8NLkXxJK1b3RR6BmiWtbak5t98KQX94KGyALJ8WHs4MTH2bW5Zf1rtja3pyWnuZR7dS3A9aTAzNfZcwLrHin](https://solscan.io/tx/3N6g8NLkXxJK1b3RR6BmiWtbak5t98KQX94KGyALJ8WHs4MTH2bW5Zf1rtja3pyWnuZR7dS3A9aTAzNfZcwLrHin)
   * No initial USDC was allocated due to the DAO Treasury having less than 500,000 USDC.

## b. Continuous Funding
* On a quarterly basis, the Ecosystem Fund shall be refilled, if: 
   * The amount of ATLAS in the Ecosystem Fund is less than 20% of the total ATLAS in the DAO Treasury plus Ecosystem Fund wallets.  If this occurs, an amount will be sent from the DAO Treasury to make the Ecosystem Fund total 20%.
   * The USDC amount in the DAO Treasury exceeds $500,000. If this occurs, 20% of the amount **above** 500K USDC shall be sent to the Ecosystem Fund. If the DAO Treasury does not have more than $500,000 USDC in its wallet, no USDC will be sent.
* The quarterly dates shall be on or about Mar 31, Jun 20, Sep 30, and Dec 31 of each year.

## c. Funding Rules
* Payments from the Ecosystem Fund shall only be made through the proposal process described in this PIP.
* In Section 8 COST & RESOURCE ALLOCATION of an Ecosystem Fund PIP, it shall only list USDC. PIPs shall not list ATLAS or any other currency/denomination when requesting funding.
* The Ecosystem Fund shall only pay in ATLAS. 
* While USDC remains an insignificant part of the DAO Treasury Fund, any Continuous Funding received in USDC shall be converted to ATLAS in a timely manner. 
* No Ecosystem Fund PIP shall exceed 5% of the “Balance After” of the last refill transaction.
   * For Example: In the July 2025 refill transaction (transaction ID [KkCq9JzQT7Tb2HPfwVDBiFuAcb3eDvE1Ab3GhkCksYJJgN8pi1CQR1VeLa7DKxRsV5kTeUTME5qCz4FtPSSmASD](https://solscan.io/tx/KkCq9JzQT7Tb2HPfwVDBiFuAcb3eDvE1Ab3GhkCksYJJgN8pi1CQR1VeLa7DKxRsV5kTeUTME5qCz4FtPSSmASD#tokenBalanceChange)), 87M ATLAS was refilled, the “Balance Before” was 136,543,091 and the “Balance After” was 224,094,330. A calculation of 5% of 224M is 11,204,716.50 ATLAS.
   * In this example, the 11.2M ATLAS becomes the new 5% limit until the next refill transaction.
* No PIP shall exceed 12 months in duration, whether delivering a product or performing a service.

## d. Funding Proposal Process
* To apply for funding, applicants shall create a PIP in accordance with the process specified in PIP-1.
* Additionally, proposals shall follow the guidelines in Star Atlas [DAO Knowledgebase](https://star-atlas-dao.gitbook.io/knowledge-base), which contains additional requirements for creating a proposal.

___

# 5. STAKEHOLDER IMPACT
* Impact is expected to be positive. This will give clearer guidance to DAO members. Concepts and definitions have been standardized for clarity and language was made easier to understand.

___

# 6. IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS
* SAC’s duties are:
   * Review and steward proposals that apply to Section 3
   * Coordinate to obtain special approval for proposals that do not apply to Section 3
   * Implement PIPs and track payments made
* SAC’s duties are not:
   * Authorizing any legally binding contracts
   * Executing the transaction to refill the Ecosystem Fund
   * Completing KYC/KYB (Know Your Customer/Know Your Business)
   * Approving a PIP before proceeding to vote

# 7. TIMELINE
* This PIP was originally passed as PIP-4 on Aug 6, 2024, and will continue in the form of this PIP.
* If passed, this PIP will implement immediately until modified or revoked.

___

# 8. COST & RESOURCE ALLOCATION
* No immediate cost impact. As of the date of this PIP, the following refill transactions have been made
   * Oct 4, 2024: Initial funding of 159,713,142 ATLAS to wallet BxKehkp298nQunu8BWxh5U6VvfphFyjEB3t7USst7Uag [transaction link](https://solscan.io/tx/3N6g8NLkXxJK1b3RR6BmiWtbak5t98KQX94KGyALJ8WHs4MTH2bW5Zf1rtja3pyWnuZR7dS3A9aTAzNfZcwLrHin)
   * Jul 3, 2025: Continuous funding of 87,551,239 ATLAS to wallet [BxKehkp298nQunu8BWxh5U6VvfphFyjEB3t7USst7Uag [transaction link](https://solscan.io/tx/KkCq9JzQT7Tb2HPfwVDBiFuAcb3eDvE1Ab3GhkCksYJJgN8pi1CQR1VeLa7DKxRsV5kTeUTME5qCz4FtPSSmASD)
* Any costs related to the management of this PIP shall be included in the Star Atlas Foundation Company’s budget.

___

# 9. ADDITIONAL DETAILS
* Conflicts of Interest: None
* Earlier Versions: [PIP-4](https://govern.staratlas.com/proposals/ad1945d8-60dc-4ed7-b52a-63dd33f97415) was originally enacted on Aug 6, 2024.
